summary: The session focused on interdisciplinary collaborations in computer science, discussing various examples and their impacts across different fields. The user expressed interest in exploring these collaborations and sought advice on initiating them, as well as resources for further learning.
facts: The user is interested in interdisciplinary collaborations in computer science. The user plans to start by attending interdisciplinary events to make connections. The user received tips on initiating interdisciplinary collaborations, including being proactive and finding common ground. The user was provided with resources for learning more about interdisciplinary collaborations, including NSF funding opportunities and an interdisciplinary programs directory. The user expressed excitement about exploring opportunities in interdisciplinary collaborations.
